description: A pack of small, dependency-free PHP helper snippets for the Code Area — slug(), human_bytes(), time_ago() and friends. Install it, read the source, and activate the ones you want.

review.notes: Public repo; valid module.json + TIGER.md at v0.1.0-beta; slug matches (code-utils); MIT license; release v0.1.0-beta present. type:code — a Code Area snippet pack: 6 dependency-free helper snippets in snippets/, each a self-describing tiger:snippet file defining one function_exists-guarded global function; no routes/controllers/schema. Directory media (logo) in media/.
